name: linkedin_engagement_metrics
description: Fetch real engagement metrics (impressions, reactions, comments, reshares) for one client's already-published LinkedIn post via the LinkedIn API. Read-only, secondary-platform (Slice 6a). Fails loud when the post's platform_post_id is invalid or the client's LinkedIn credentials are missing rather than fabricating a metrics snapshot.

client_id.description: Client this engagement pull is scoped to.

draft_id.description: The post_draft/published_post id this metrics pull is for; threaded into the returned engagement_memory entry.

platform_post_id.description: LinkedIn's own id for the published post, from published_post.platforms.linkedin.platform_post_id.
